sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current grid state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current grid cells (bottom-right 3x3):")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    min_r = min(r for r,c in n['boundary'])
    min_c = min(c for r,c in n['boundary'])
    if min_r >= 47 and min_c >= 22:  # grid area
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, bbox=[{min_r},{min_c}], pixels={n['pixels']}, children={n['children']}")

# Check target pattern (bottom-left)
print("\nTarget pattern cells:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    min_r = min(r for r,c in n['boundary'])
    min_c = min(c for r,c in n['boundary'])
    if min_r >= 48 and min_r <= 60 and min_c >= 10 and min_c <= 21:
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, bbox=[{min_r},{min_c}], pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
